memberdef.argsstring: (struct dma_chan_parms define_function[1], u32 dp_hres, u32 dp_vres, u8 pixel)

briefdescription.para: This file contains functions to configure Video Pattern Generator core.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 KI 07/13/17 Initial release.
